toolSpec.name: get_PCF
toolSpec.description: Look up nutrition facts (calories, protein, fat, carbs per 100g) for a food item from the USDA FoodData Central database. Returns {calories, protein, fat, carbs} in floats.

food_name.description: Name of the food item in English (e.g., 'fried chicken', 'white rice', 'grilled pork chop')

toolSpec.name: get_ingredients
toolSpec.description: Look up the ingredient list for a packaged/branded food item from the USDA database. Returns a list of ingredient name strings, or null if no ingredient data is available (common for non-branded foods).

food_name.description: Name of the food item in English (e.g., 'snickers bar', 'coca cola', 'oreo cookies')

toolSpec.name: get_PCF_and_ingredients
toolSpec.description: Combined lookup: returns both nutrition facts (calories, protein, fat, carbs per 100g) AND ingredient list for a food item. Returns {description, PCF_nutrients: {calories, protein, fat, carbs}, ingredients: [...] or null}. Use this as the primary tool for each dish to get comprehensive USDA data in one call.

food_name.description: Name of the food item in English (e.g., 'fried rice', 'grilled pork', 'pho bo')
